Email._smtpComment: SMTP credentials live in User Secrets in dev (Manage User Secrets) and in appsettings.Production.json on the server. Leaving them empty here means EmailService logs but doesn't send — safe for the demo.

Payments._comment: International payment providers. Both Stripe and PayPal are stubs without credentials — drop the values into User Secrets to activate. The corresponding feature flag (international.payments_stripe / payments_paypal) must also be enabled in DevChanges → Feature Flags.

CourierGuy._apiKeyComment: Set your TCG API key in User Secrets in dev (right-click project > Manage User Secrets) or in appsettings.Production.json on the server. Leave this empty in source control.
CourierGuy._webhookAuthKeyComment: Any random 32+ character string. Configure the SAME value in The Courier Guy portal under Settings > Webhook subscriptions > Auth key.

Analytics._comment: Off-the-shelf analytics IDs. The matching feature flag (analytics.ga4 / analytics.clarity) must also be enabled before the tag is injected. Leave blank in source control; populate via User Secrets in dev and appsettings.Production.json on the server.

Shipping._comment: ShumoShop dispatch address used when booking shipments. The carrier sub-sections hold per-carrier API credentials. Leave them blank in source control; populate via User Secrets in dev and appsettings.Production.json on the server.

Dhl._comment: MyDHL+ API. Sign up at developer.dhl.com → My DHL API.

Fedex._comment: FedEx Developer Portal. Sign up at developer.fedex.com.

Aramex._comment: Aramex business APIs (SOAP). Get credentials from your Aramex account manager.
